expectations.evidence: Would check tasks.md for all [x], verify delta specs exist, confirm PR is passing.

expectations.text: Syncs delta specs to main specs
expectations.evidence: Would merge delta specs into openspec/specs/ — acknowledges not knowing the exact merge convention without reading the skill.

expectations.text: Converts test cases to reusable scenarios
expectations.evidence: Would only check if concrete test files exist; has no knowledge of TS-NNN-<slug>.md format or explicit Step 4.5 conversion pattern.
Would create PR per CLAUDE.md convention (branch from development, PR to development, 1 review required).
Would apply Hydra terminal label instead of closing — confuses /opsx-archive with the Hydra pipeline label state machine. Would not call gh issue close / update_issue directly.
